zh.Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可凱特萊包
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Small Stebbing於1475年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可凱特萊包時，他的父親William Stebbing45歲，母親Mabell Holway Small45歲。他和Alice "Rannelegh" Adams至少有9個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1555年在他的家鄉享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stebbing
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Steb, a boll, a trunk, and ing, originating from, meaning offspring of a trunk, a shoot, a branch

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Small
meanings: Found as a baptismal name, and corrupted from Mary.

en.lifeSummary: When John Small Stebbing was born in 1475, in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Stebbing, was 45 and his mother, Mabell Holway Small, was 45. He had at least 9 sons and 1 daughter with Alice "Rannelegh" Adams. He died in 1555, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Small Stebbing est né en 1475, à Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Stebbing, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mabell Holway Small, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille avec Alice "Rannelegh" Adams. Il est décédé en 1555, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Small Stebbing 1475 in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Stebbing 45 und seine Mutter Mabell Holway Small 45. Er hatte mit Alice "Rannelegh" Adams mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1555 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Small Stebbing è nato il nel 1475 nel Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Stebbing, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Mabell Holway Small, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia con Alice "Rannelegh" Adams. Morì nel 1555, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Small Stebbing(이)가 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 케틀레버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stebbing(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabell Holway Small(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Alice "Rannelegh" Adams(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Small Stebbing родился в 1475 г. в местности кеттлебург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Stebbing было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabell Holway Small, 45.
